meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering Project Management for AI Apps
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' barrier. Learn advanced project management workflows for AI builders using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your portfolio.
content.answer_block: To evolve beyond basic tutorials, shift from coding features to managing systems. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for iterative execution, you treat your project as a professional product. This disciplined approach eliminates scope creep, enforces modularity, and ensures your portfolio reflects production-ready engineering standards.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks following tutorials, yet your GitHub is filled with disconnected scripts that feel more like toys than tools. The frustration isn't your lack of coding ability; it is the lack of a systemic project management framework. You are stuck because you are building features, not architectures.

Today, we pivot. We are moving away from 'just making it work' toward building scalable, maintainable AI applications. By leveraging professional-grade orchestration tools like Antigravity and the raw power of Claude Code, you will transform your development process from a chaotic scramble into a precise, high-velocity engineering workflow.

steps.title: Define the Architectural Blueprint
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, define your system boundaries to avoid feature bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project concept and generate a modular architecture document including state management, API service layers, and database schema definitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a project directory structure based on the architectural blueprint defined in the documentation.'

steps.title: Establish an Iterative Development Loop
steps.description: Break down complex features into atomic tasks to maintain momentum and code quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break the core functionality into 5 distinct milestones with measurable success criteria for each.
steps.claude_code_command: claude task --start 'Initialize Milestone 1: Authentication and User Session management'

steps.title: Enforce Strict Type Safety
steps.description: Use automated tools to ensure your AI-generated code remains robust and error-free.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the codebase and generate a comprehensive TypeScript interface set that covers all data models and API responses.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Refactor current components to implement the generated TypeScript interfaces strictly.'

steps.title: Implement Automated Quality Gates
steps.description: Integrate testing early so you can build with confidence as the project grows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for the core business logic components, focusing on edge cases and error handling.

steps.title: Finalize for Production Readiness
steps.description: Optimize your code for performance and security before deploying your portfolio piece.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the project for potential security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks in the data pipeline.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Decision Log' in your README to explain why you chose specific libraries; interviewers love this.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation as you code, not after, to keep your project's context window fresh.
Treat your API keys and environment secrets as immutable; never commit them, even in private repos.
Focus on building one 'killer feature' that works perfectly rather than five features that are buggy.
Automate your feedback loop by linking Antigravity to your commit messages to track progress against your original plan.
content.next_steps: Once your first production-ready app is live, document the architecture in a blog post to demonstrate your technical communication skills to potential employers.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to build beyond the basics. Stop being a student of tutorials and start being a lead engineer of your own products. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
